generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values security and order, I'm glad to see our leaders taking proactive steps to strengthen domestic security powers. The recent incidents show we can't afford to be complacent. While some worry about civil liberties, we've seen how delayed responses can lead to bigger problems. It's about finding the right balance - and right now, I trust our government to get that balance right. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurCommunities
